underlying_goal: Implement a feature-flagged addition of 5 new languages (Amharic, Somali, Turkish, Vietnamese, Nepali) to the Interpret system, ship it as a PR, and research whether the Scribe pipeline supports them
brief_summary: User asked to implement new languages behind a feature flag, ship the PR, and research Scribe pipeline support — all three tasks were completed successfully with CI green and no issues.
